parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
header Intel Corporation
title PFD flow between Openness and 5G core
footer Proprietary and Confidential

actor Admin

box "OpenNESS Controller Components" #LightBlue
participant "UI/CLI" as UI
participant "Af Microservice" as AF
end box

box "5G Core Components" #LightGreen
participant NEF
participant "NGC CP Function" as NGC
end box

note over NEF
OpenNESS provided
Core component with
limited functionality
end note

group Get all transactions with PFD
    Admin -> UI : Request all PFD transactions
    UI -> AF : af/v1/pfd/transaction GET
    AF -> NEF : 3gpp-pfd-management/v1/{scsAsId}/transactions/\nGET
    NEF -> NEF : NGC_STUB (UDR SMF)
    NEF -> AF : OK: PFD information \\ ERROR
    AF -> UI : OK: PFD information \\ ERROR
    UI -> Admin : PFD details
end

group Get transactions with transactionId
    Admin -> UI : Request transaction with\ntransactionId
    UI -> AF : af/v1/pfd/transactions/{transactionId}\nGET
    AF -> NEF : 3gpp-pfd-management/v1/{scsAsId}/transactions/{transactionId}\nGET
    NEF -> NEF : NGC_STUB (UDR SMF)
    NEF -> AF : OK: PFD information \\ ERROR
    AF -> UI : OK: PFD information \\ ERROR
    UI -> Admin : PFD details
end

group Get transactions with applicationId
    Admin -> UI : Request transactions with\napplicationId
    UI -> AF : af/v1/pfd/transactions/{transactionId}/applications/{appId}\nGET
    AF -> NEF : 3gpp-pfd-management/v1/{scsAsId}/transactions/{transactionId}/applications/{appId}\nGET
    NEF -> NEF : NGC_STUB (UDR SMF)
    NEF -> AF : OK: PFD information \\ ERROR
    AF -> UI : OK: PFD information \\ ERROR
    UI -> Admin : PFD details
end

@enduml
```
